title: FRUTA FEIA / PORTUGAL
subtitle: GET INSPIRED! A ROADMAP TO REPLICATE KNOWLEDGE AND EXPERIENCE ABOUT FAIR FOOD SUPPLY CHAINS
description: A replication roadmap based on the Fruta Feia cooperative model in Portugal, demonstrating how to establish a fair supply chain for imperfect fruits and vegetables to reduce farm-level food waste. It provides guidance on funding strategies, partnership structures, and operational best practices to connect small-scale producers with socially minded consumers.
